<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-ê]][[de:Wasser-Schaf]][[fr:Chèvre d'eau]][[hak:Kui-vi]][[ja:癸未]][[ko:계미]][[nds:Water-Schaap]][[vi:Quý Mùi]][[za:Gveiqmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-bī]][[zh-yue:癸未]][[zh:癸未]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-ê]][[de:Wasser-Schaf]][[fr:Chèvre d'eau]][[hak:Kui-vi]][[ja:癸未]][[ko:계미]][[nds:Water-Schaap]][[vi:Quý Mùi]][[za:Gveiqmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-bī]][[zh-yue:癸未]][[zh:癸未]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-ê]][[de:Wasser-Schaf]][[fr:Chèvre d'eau]][[hak:Kui-vi]][[ja:癸未]][[ko:계미]][[nds:Water-Schaap]][[vi:Quý Mùi]][[za:Gveiqmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-bī]][[zh-yue:癸未]][[zh:癸未]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Goat also known as  癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].

It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is [[Yang Water Horse]], and the following sign is [[Yang Wood Monkey]]. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Water Goat (癸未)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji
***Onyomi 1: kingi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi

<!--
==
* Yin Water Goat (癸未) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: みずのとひつじ (mizunoto-hitsuji)
***Onyomi: きかのひつじ (kika-no-hitsuji)
***Onyomi: きび (kibi)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemi
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi

-->
==Years of Yin Water Goat==
Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[Gregorian calendar]].

{| class="wikitable"
|+ '''Years of 癸未'''
|-
! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]]
|-
|
* [[23]]
* [[83]]
* [[143]]
* [[203]]
* [[263]]
* [[323]]
* [[383]]
* [[443]]
* [[503]]
* [[563]]
* [[623]]
* [[683]]
* [[743]]
* [[803]]
* [[863]]
* [[923]]
* [[983]]
|
* [[1043]]
* [[1103]]
* [[1163]]
* [[1223]]
* [[1283]]
* [[1343]]
* [[1403]]
* [[1463]]
* [[1523]]
* [[1583]]
* [[1643]]
* [[1703]]
* [[1763]]
* [[1823]]
* [[1883]]
* [[1943]]
|
* [[2003]]
* [[2063]]
* [[2123]]
* [[:en:2183|2183]]
* [[:en:2243|2243]]
* [[:en:2303|2303]]
* [[:en:2363|2363]]
* [[:en:2423|2423]]
* [[:en:2483|2483]]
* [[2543]]
* [[2603]]
* [[2663]]
* [[2723]]
* [[2783]]
* [[2843]]
* [[:en:2903|2903]]
* [[:en:2963|2963]]
|}

==Months of Yin Water Goat==
The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems [[Kanoe (庚)]] and [[Kinoto (乙)]]) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[:en:Lesser Heat|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Autumn|Beginning of Autumn]]).

==Days of Yin Water Goat==
Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of [[Tsuchi (Japanese term)]].

=== Special days ===
Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.

== Related Articles ==
* {{prefix|qq=}}
* {{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Kui-chhiū]]
[[zh-yue:癸未]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Water Goat|qq=ja|癸未|version=84123771|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Kui-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Wasser-Ziegenevi]]
[[de:Yin Water Goat]]

[[ja:癸未]]
[[zh:癸未]]
[[ko:계미]]
[[fr:Chèvre de eau]]
[[de:Wasser-Schaf]]
[[fr:Ch%C3%A8vre d%27eau]]
[[zh:%E7%99%B8%E6%9C%AA]]

[[af:Waterbok (astrologie)]]
[[de:Wasser-Ziegeneen]]
[[en:Water Goat]]
[[fr:Chèvre de eauboishak]]
[[it:Kui-chṳ́id]]

[[vi:Quý Mùi]]
[[za:Gueiceij]]
[[ar:Yin Water Goat]]

<!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--><!--Yin Water Goat--><!--Yin Water Goat-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[cdo:Gŭi-ê]]
[[fr:Chèvre d'eau]]
[[hak:Kui-vi]]
[[nds:Water-Schaap]]
[[za:Gveiqmeih]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kùi-bī]]
[[zh-yue:癸未]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[cdo:Gŭi-ê]]
[[fr:Chèvre d'eau]]
[[hak:Kui-vi]]
[[nds:Water-Schaap]]
[[za:Gveiqmeih]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kùi-bī]]
[[zh-yue:癸未]]
{{wikidata link|Q1062599}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
